## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test update

## Validation

Describe what you ran locally (commands + results).

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran relevant tests locally
- [ ] I updated docs where needed
- [ ] I kept changes scoped to this PR
- [ ] I verified no sensitive data was added

## Related Issues

Link issues with `Closes #<issue-number>` where applicable.
